message:
🌱 vault: v1.14.0 breaks AWS EKS IRSA credentials for DynamoDB backend (#1116)

* 🌱 Add vault: v1.14.0 breaks AWS EKS IRSA credentials for DynamoDB backend mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🐛 Fix vault-21465 mission: correct type to bug, fix PR link and malformed snippet

PR #21930 was closed/not merged. Actual fix was PR #21951 (awsutil update
to v0.2.3, merged July 2023). Changed type from "deploy" to "bug", fixed
issueTypes/tags, removed malformed "Helm values excerpt:" code snippet,
and updated resolution summary.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "vault-21465-v1-14-0-breaks-aws-eks-irsa-credentials-for-dynamodb-backend",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "vault: v1.14.0 breaks AWS EKS IRSA credentials for DynamoDB backend",
+    "description": "v1.14.0 breaks AWS EKS IRSA credentials for DynamoDB backend. Requested by 17+ users.",
+    "type": "bug",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current vault setup",
+        "description": "Verify your vault version and configuration:\n```bash\nvault version\n```\nThis feature requires a working vault installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review vault configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant vault configuration:\nStartup logs:\n\n```\n2023-06-27T00:36:30.759Z [INFO]  proxy environment: http_proxy=\"\" https_proxy=\"\" no_proxy=\"\"\nError initializing storage of type dynamodb: NoCredentialProviders: no valid providers in chain. Deprecated."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade awsutil to fix IRSA credential chain",
+        "description": "The fix was implemented in PR #21951 (merged July 2023), which updated the awsutil dependency to v0.2.3. The root cause was that the awsutil NewCredentialsConfig constructor was not being called properly, breaking the credential chain that includes IRSA web identity token support.\n```bash\n# Upgrade Vault to v1.14.1 or later which includes the fix\nvault version\n# Follow the project upgrade guide at https://github.com/hashicorp/vault\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"v1.14.0 breaks AWS EKS IRSA credentials for DynamoDB backend\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The issue was caused by how awsutil was used to derive credentials. The NewCredentialsConfig constructor method was not being called properly, breaking the IRSA credential chain. PR #21951 (merged July 2023) updated awsutil to v0.2.3, which fixed the credential derivation logic. The fix was backported to the 1.14.x release branch in PR #21957.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "2023-06-27T00:36:30.759Z [INFO]  proxy environment: http_proxy=\"\" https_proxy=\"\" no_proxy=\"\"\nError initializing storage of type dynamodb: NoCredentialProviders: no valid providers in chain. Deprecated.\n    For verbose messaging see aws.Config.CredentialsChainVerboseErrors"
+      ]
+    }
+  },

+    ],

+    },

+  },
